calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for two Minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio #12353

Petitioners Shanon Loftus and Sean Martin (parents) present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the minors Finneas Xavier Martin and Deirdre Jolie Martin.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name of a minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to Finneas Xavier Loftus-Martin and Deirdre Jolie Loftus-Martin.
Decree Changing Name of a Minors was submitted to and signed by the Court.
